source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal/squamous cytokeratin strongly associated with aberrant basaloid differentiation in lung
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the hybrid epithelial phenotype of aberrant basaloid cells
KRT19 marks luminal/simple epithelial identity consistent with the aberrant basaloid phenotype
TP63 is a master transcription factor of basal cell identity, defining the basaloid component
E-cadherin marks the epithelial character of these aberrant basaloid cells
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase associated with aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung disease
TROP2 (TACSTD2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in aberrant basaloid populations
GDF15 is a stress-response cytokine upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells in IPF
Integrin beta-6 activates TGF-beta and is a hallmark of aberrant basaloid cells in pulmonary fibrosis
SOX4 is a developmental transcription factor associated with the transitional basaloid state
FABP4 is a canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid-rich alveolar niche
MARCO is a scavenger receptor highly specific to alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a scavenger receptor characteristic of tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a master transcription factor required for alveolar macrophage differentiation and identity
Complement C1q subunit A is highly expressed in alveolar macrophages for immune surveillance
Complement C1q subunit B is co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue-resident macrophages
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly enriched in alveolar macrophages reflecting lipid metabolism
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor marking alternatively activated alveolar macrophages
APOE is involved in lipid transport and is highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine constitutively produced by alveolar macrophages in the lung
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells in the lung
Caveolin-1 is highly expressed in AT1 cells, essential for their thin gas-exchange morphology
EMP2 is a membrane protein strongly enriched in alveolar type 1 epithelial cells

CLIC5 is a chloride channel enriched in AT1 cells involved in fluid homeostasis
RTKN2 is a recently identified specific marker of human AT1 cells

CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells as part of MHC class II antigen presentation
MS4A1 (CD20) is the canonical B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex, essential for B cell signaling
PAX5 is a master transcription factor required for B cell lineage commitment and identity
EBF1 is a transcription factor essential for early B cell development and maintenance
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling

TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor critical for mature B cell maintenance

BACH2 is a transcription factor important for B cell differentiation and class switch recombination

KRT5 is a definitive basal cell marker in stratified and pseudostratified epithelia
KRT15 marks basal progenitor cells in the airway epithelium
TP63 is the master transcription factor defining basal cell identity in epithelial tissues
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in basal epithelial cells

EGFR is highly expressed in basal cells driving proliferation and self-renewal
